zh.Kenyon, Leigh, Lancashire, England: 英國英格蘭藍卡爾凱尼恩
zh.Kenyon, Lancashire, England: 英國英格蘭藍卡爾凱尼恩
zh.lifeSummary: 當Adam de Kenyon III於大約1311年出生在英國英格蘭藍卡爾凱尼恩時，他的父親Lord Adam II de Kenyon39歲，母親Margaret Maud Hesketh35歲。他於大約1326年與Matilda Maud de Hesketh在英國英格蘭藍卡爾凱尼恩結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。他去世於1358年在英國藍卡爾文維其可享年48歲。

zh-hans.Kenyon, Leigh, Lancashire, England: 英国英格兰藍卡爾凱尼恩
zh-hans.Kenyon, Lancashire, England: 英国英格兰藍卡爾凱尼恩
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Adam de Kenyon III于大约1311年出生在英国英格兰藍卡爾凱尼恩时，他的父亲Lord Adam II de Kenyon39岁，母亲Margaret Maud Hesketh35岁。他于大约1326年与Matilda Maud de Hesketh在英国英格兰藍卡爾凱尼恩结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。他去世于1358年在英国藍卡爾文維其可享年48岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Kenyon
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Lancashire): habitational name from a place near Warrington, which is of uncertain etymology. There was formerly an ancient burial mound there and Ekwall has speculated that the name is a shortened form of a British name composed of the elements crūc ‘mound’ + a personal name cognate with Welsh Einion (see Eynon ).

Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Coinín ‘son of Coinín’, a byname based on a diminutive of cano ‘wolf’, also Anglicized as Canning and Cunneen . The similarity to the borrowed word coinín ‘coney, rabbit’ has sometimes caused this name to be Anglicized as Rabbitt .
Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Fhinghin, ‘son of Finghen’, a personal name meaning ‘fair-born’.

variants.name: Eynon
meanings: Welsh: from Enniaun, an old Welsh personal name ultimately derived from Late Latin Annianus, but also associated with Welsh einion ‘anvil’, taken as implying stability and fortitude. See also Beynon and compare Onion .

variants.name: Kinion
meanings: English and Irish: variant of   Kenyon  . Compare   Kinyon  .

variants.name: Kinyon
meanings: English and Irish: variant of   Kenyon  . Compare   Kinion  .

nameMeanings.name: Adam
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Adam de Kenyon III was born about 1311, in Kenyon, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Lord Adam II de Kenyon, was 39 and his mother, Margaret Maud Hesketh, was 35. He married Matilda Maud de Hesketh about 1326, in Kenyon, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. He died in 1358, in Winwick, Lancashire, England, at the age of 48.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Adam de Kenyon III est né environ 1311, à Kenyon, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Lord Adam II de Kenyon, avait 39 ans et sa mère, Margaret Maud Hesketh, avait 35 ans. Il a épousé Matilda Maud de Hesketh environ 1326, à Kenyon, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1358, à Winwick, Lancashire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 48 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Adam de Kenyon III um 1311 in Kenyon, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Lord Adam II de Kenyon 39 und seine Mutter Margaret Maud Hesketh 35. Er hat um 1326 in Kenyon, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom Matilda Maud de Hesketh geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Er starb 1358 im Alter von 48 Jahren in Winwick, Lancashire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Adam de Kenyon III è nato il circa 1311 nel Kenyon, Lancashire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Lord Adam II de Kenyon, aveva 39 anni e il suo madre, Margaret Maud Hesketh, aveva 35 anni. Lui sposato Matilda Maud de Hesketh circa 1326, nel Kenyon, Lancashire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Morì nel 1358, nel Winwick, Lancashire, England, all'età di 48 anni.

ja.Kenyon, Lancashire, England: イギリスイギリスランカシュアイアケニーオン
ja.lifeSummary: Adam de Kenyon IIIが約1311年にイギリスイギリスランカシュアイアケニーオンで生まれた時，父Lord Adam II de Kenyonは39歳，母Margaret Maud Heskethは35歳であった。約1326年にイギリスイギリスランカシュアイアケニーオンでMatilda Maud de Heskethと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼は1358年にイギリスランカシュアイアウィンウィックで48歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Adam de Kenyon III(이)가 대략 1311년 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 켄욘에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Lord Adam II de Kenyon(은)는 39세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Maud Hesketh(은)는 35세였다. 그는 대략 1326년 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 켄욘에서 Matilda Maud de Hesketh(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1358년 영국 랭카실르 윈윅에서 48세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Adam de Kenyon III nasceu aproximadamente 1311, em Kenyon, Lancashire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Lord Adam II de Kenyon, tinha 39 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Maud Hesketh, tinha 35 anos. Ele casou-se com Matilda Maud de Hesketh aproximadamente 1326, em Kenyon, Lancashire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 1358, em Winwick, Lancashire, Inglaterra, com 48 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Adam de Kenyon III родился около 1311 г. в местности кенен, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Lord Adam II de Kenyon было 39 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Maud Hesketh, 35. Он женился на женщине по имени Matilda Maud de Hesketh около 1326 г. в местности кенен, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Он умер в 1358 г. в местности винвикк, ланкашир, Англия в возрасте 48 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Adam de Kenyon III nació aproximadamente 1311, en Kenyon, Lancashire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Lord Adam II de Kenyon, tenía 39 años y su mamá, Margaret Maud Hesketh, tenía 35 años. Se casó con Matilda Maud de Hesketh aproximadamente 1326, en Kenyon, Lancashire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija. Murió en 1358, en Winwick, Lancashire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 48 años.
